name: Agentic Analytics
description: AWS Workshop Studio deployable and reference sample for agentic AI-powered self-service analytics on multi-tenant SaaS, built with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore, Strands Agents, Aurora PostgreSQL, and Cedar policies.

structure.app/: Application code including agent, Lambda functions, and UI
structure.app/agentcore_strands/tools/: Lambda toolset functions (prebaked SQL, custom SQL, API integration)
structure.app/agentcore_strands/infra/: Gateway interceptor Lambda (interceptor_lambda.py) + Cube semantic-layer deploy scripts
structure.app/agentcore_strands/ui/: Amplify hosting deployment (optional workshop UI step)
structure.infrastructure/custom-resource-lambdas/: Custom Resource Lambda handlers for CFN
structure.dataset/: Symlink to unicorn-rental-dataset - synthetic data, schema, docs, and validation
structure.workshop/code/: Workshop code overlay with TODO blanks (agent, exercises, top-up CFN, Makefile)
structure.dev/: Maintainer-only files (unshipped): app-index.json, the Strands Evals harness (dev/evaluation/), the project spec (dev/specs/), and maintainer skills (dev/skills/)

files.summary: Agent context file (AGENTS.md standard) — architecture, deployment modes, commands, conventions, config, test users, security layers

Project documentation with architecture overview, prerequisites, infrastructure deployment, quick start guide, available analytics queries, write operations, text-to-SQL workflow, and observability setup

Root CloudFormation stack with demo/workshop modes. Supports ArtifactsPrefix for Workshop Studio magic variables. Demo deploys everything; workshop deploys infrastructure + EC2 VS Code (no AgentCore/Amplify)
CloudFormation stack with custom resource Lambda for database schema, data, and views initialization via RDS Data API
CloudFormation stack for Bedrock Knowledge Base with Aurora pgvector, custom data source, and hierarchical chunking (parent=1000, child=300, overlap=50)
CloudFormation stack for AgentCore Gateway deployment with custom resource Lambda. Supports workshop mode with CognitoUserPoolId/CognitoClientId params to use existing Cognito

Workshop AgentCore top-up stack (canonical, all-live answer key). Standalone version of agentcore-stack.yaml using Fn::ImportValue for base inputs; resources ordered so each toolset Lambda+target is one uncomment fence; EnforceRls condition for the Step 7.2 RLS switch; workshop-simplified wildcard GatewayRole; container build chain replaces the agentcore CLI. KEEP IN SYNC with agentcore-stack.yaml.
Participant-facing copy of the AgentCore top-up, commented down to the Step-2 baseline. Each lab step uncomments one fenced section. Ships via the workshop/code overlay.

Thin workshop wrapper: make deploy (cloudformation deploy of the top-up), make build (rebuild agent image + roll runtime via the replace-trap), make outputs/status, make voice-deploy. Reads coordinates from config.env.
Participant copy of the voice stack (verbatim of infrastructure/stacks/voice-agentcore-stack.yaml) for the optional Voice lab; deployed via make voice-deploy.

Optional workshop page (weight 78, after Cube): deploy a voice front-end for the same analytics agent via make voice-deploy + a config.js edit. Separate AgentCore Runtime (Pipecat, WebRTC+KVS TURN) reusing the Step-2 agent.
CloudFormation stack to enable CloudWatch Transaction Search via custom resource Lambda (logs:PutResourcePolicy + xray:UpdateTraceSegmentDestination + xray:UpdateIndexingRule)
Custom Resource Lambda to enable CloudWatch Transaction Search — one-time per-account setup required for AgentCore traces to be visible in GenAI Observability dashboard

Standalone Cognito stack for workshop mode - User Pool with custom:role/account_id, Pre-Token Lambda V2 (inlined ZipFile), App Client, users from S3 CSV, SSM credentials storage, Identity Pool for demo mode
Custom Resource Lambda for database initialization - loads schema.sql, CSV data, creates views via RDS Data API
Custom Resource Lambda to trigger Glue crawler and wait for completion
Custom Resource Lambda to create Bedrock KB with Aurora pgvector and ingest business-context.md via IngestKnowledgeBaseDocuments API
Custom Resource Lambda to deploy React UI to Amplify Hosting from S3 ZIP file
CloudFormation stack for Amplify Hosting deployment with custom resource Lambda and environment variables

CloudFormation stack for EC2 VS Code (workshop mode) - Intel instance, CloudFront, IAM role with AgentCore/Lambda/Bedrock/Glue/Amplify permissions, Aurora SG ingress, URL resolver for one-click access
Script to package custom resource Lambdas and upload all deployment artifacts to S3 (demo mode)

Demo-mode backend deploy: packages + uploads artifacts then deploys main-stack.yaml (nested CFN). --agent-only fast path re-zips the agent, rebuilds the image and rolls the AgentCore Runtime (re-sending authorizer/header/network config).
Script to package deployment artifacts for Workshop Studio - copies templates to static/assets, packages Lambda ZIPs, copies data/schema/docs/drivers/repo
Interactive deploy script for Workshop Studio - prompts for WS repo path and S3 assets, packages artifacts, syncs to S3, copies to WS repo, commits and pushes

Main Strands agent with AgentCore Gateway, Cognito JWT auth, memory hooks (STM, max_results=20), native Bedrock guardrails, SOP from file/S3, current_datetime tool. Model: Claude Opus 4.6 Global CRIS. rls_context passed as parameter (no globals).

Deployment script for React UI to Amplify Hosting - builds app, creates Amplify app/branch, deploys via presigned URL. Usable standalone (optional workshop UI step) or via the amplify_hosting custom-resource Lambda in demo mode
Python dependencies for agent and Lambda functions
React chat interface with query plan approval workflow - parseSqlApproval, SqlApprovalCard (shows business-level query plan, not raw SQL), streaming support, and human-in-the-loop UI
AWS SDK integration for BedrockAgentCoreClient, invokeAgent with streaming, session management, gateway token passing. Tool detection via structured toolUse events only (no regex fallback).
Cognito authentication service with simulated user, token fetching (delegated to agent due to CORS), and user context for multi-tenant isolation
CloudFormation template for Aurora PostgreSQL Serverless v2 with VPC, subnets, security groups, NAT gateway, Secrets Manager, and RDS Data API enabled

CloudFormation template for AWS Glue Data Catalog - database, IAM role, crawler, dedicated S3 bucket for JDBC driver (copied from artifacts via inline Lambda), and connection configuration for Aurora PostgreSQL
Gateway interceptor Lambda for JWT header propagation (RLS). Bundled into the live gateway_interceptor.zip by both demo (package_and_upload.sh) and workshop (package_for_workshop.sh) packagers.
Cube semantic-layer lab (documented script exception): deploys the parallel semantic AgentCore Runtime (agent/unicorn_rental_semantic_agent.py).
Cube semantic-layer lab (documented script exception): generates/deploys Cube data models.
Cube semantic-layer lab (documented script exception): deploys the semantic-layer toolset target to the Gateway.
13 requirements with acceptance criteria covering natural language processing, multi-tenant isolation, core data access, analytics tools, write operations, and infrastructure automation
Architecture design document with implementation status, component diagram, data flow, and infrastructure gap analysis
12 task groups implementation plan for CloudFormation, Glue integration, embeddings, and test coverage
Business context documentation for database tables with schemas in YAML format, including unicorns, availability tracking, bookings, transactions, subscription tracker, and views
User stories for the timely-unicorn rental management system covering admin and staff perspectives
PostgreSQL DDL script with ENUM types, tables, triggers, and 22 views for the unicorn rental application
Dataset documentation with overview, schema structure, views, data files, and license (CC0-1.0)
Workshop Studio contentspec - deploys main-stack.yaml with magic variables for ArtifactsBucket/ArtifactsPrefix, workshop mode, 2 deployable regions
Learning exercise: simplified local Strands agent for Step 1
Pre-computed ground truth answers from PostgreSQL for both Mythical Unicorns and Mythic Unicorns tenants
Strands Evals experiment with 108 test cases covering all workshop scenarios, SOP behavior, guardrails, RLS, and RBAC

Maintainer-only (unshipped): runs the Strands Evals experiment against the deployed AgentCore Runtime via agentcore invoke, per-persona Cognito auth, LLM-as-judge scoring. Step-10 reference implementation.
Maintainer-only (unshipped): expands ground_truth.json into the ~108-case Strands Evals experiment.json.
Maintainer-only (unshipped): queries a local PostgreSQL with explicit account_id filters to produce ground_truth.json.
Explains that dev/ is maintainer-only and excluded from both deploy paths; documents dev/evaluation/, dev/specs/, and dev/skills/.

Lambda with 27+ prebaked analytics tools backed by database Views. rls_context passed as parameter through handler(args, rls_context) → get_db_connection(rls_context). Includes semantic_search_tool via Bedrock KB.
Lambda for API integration tools (booking creation). rls_context from JWT for tenant-scoped writes. account_id from JWT for INSERT.
Lambda for custom SQL with full Glue schema (all tables, prefix stripped) + Bedrock KB RAG + human approval. rls_context passed as parameter.
MIT-0 license for code (dataset/ has separate CC0 license)
CC0 1.0 Universal license for synthetic dataset
Agent Skill: step-by-step procedure to package code, sync S3 assets, and push content to Workshop Studio
Agent Skill: rules for managing workshop code overlays (TODO files that override app/ in packaged ZIP)
